storage.notes: Add-on camera; no onboard microSD slot — recording is handled entirely by the paired Reolink NVR.

features: Reolink add-on PoE bullet 4K NVR expansion
NVR-only — no standalone ONVIF/RTSP (confirmed via Reolink FAQ)

frigate.notes: B800 has no standalone RTSP/ONVIF service — it is an add-on camera that only works through a Reolink PoE NVR (e.g. RLN8-410, RLN16-410). Pull this camera's channel from the NVR's own RTSP stream instead of connecting to the camera's IP directly.

home_assistant.notes: Not directly discoverable — the camera has no local ONVIF/HTTP API or UID. Add the parent Reolink NVR to the Reolink HA integration instead; this camera's channel is exposed through the NVR.

blue_iris.notes: Cannot be added directly (no local ONVIF/RTSP). Add the parent Reolink NVR as the video source and pull this camera's channel from the NVR.
